mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_CODE, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAME FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER_PROPERTY where CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_CODE, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAME FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER_PROPERTY
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CUSTOMER_PROPERTY( ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_CODE, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerPropertyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerPropertyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER_PROPERTY SET CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_CODE = #{customerPropertyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_PROPERTY_NAME = #{customerPropertyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
